case_title: PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. FREELAND COAST TO COAST COACH et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT FREELAND COAST TO COAST COACH DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-01-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-24-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-16-2009

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-01-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-29-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
